response.justification: While this is an accomplished software engineer with strong general skills and CI/CD expertise, the candidate has a fundamental mismatch with the role's core requirements. The resume shows only ~6 months of professional C++ experience (far below the required 5-10 years), no evidence of Windows-platform development expertise, and critically, zero experience in financial services, fixed income, capital markets, or investment banking domains. The candidate's career trajectory is web/full-stack and embedded systems, not the legacy C++ capital-markets systems this role demands.
strengths: Broad software engineering expertise across multiple languages and platforms (C++, Java, DLang, TypeScript, web technologies)
Strong CI/CD and DevOps background with GitLab, Docker, and infrastructure setup experience
Excellent communication and knowledge-sharing demonstrated through workshops, talks, and conference presentations
concerns: Only ~6 months of documented professional C++ experience versus the required 5-10 years in this mandatory skill
No demonstrated Windows-platform development background; career focused on web (Node.js), cross-platform tools, and embedded systems
Complete absence of capital markets, fixed income, investment banking, or financial services domain experience
